Module 7 - Lesson 2
Understanding The “Second-Chance Offer”:

-- 1 of 3 --

Module 7 - Lesson 2
Understanding The “Second-Chance Offer”:
A “Second-Chance Offer” 	Is Simply An Additional
Opportunity For The New Customer To Take
Advantage Of Any Of The Add-On Offers They
Skipped During Their Initial Transaction

-- 2 of 3 --

Module 7 - Lesson 2
Understanding The “Second-Chance Offer”:
The “Second-Chance Offer” 	Amplification
Autoresponder Chain Gives You An Additional
Opportunity To Further Monetize Buyers And
Maximize Front-End Transaction Value

-- 3 of 3 --
